ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the server */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "players" TEXT /* Number of players currently on the server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the server (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  "map" TEXT /* Game map currently being played */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number of the server */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the server was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the server was last updated */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players the server can support */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the server (e.g., PVE, PVP) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the server is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., action, strategy) */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_game_modes" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode supported by the server (e.g., PVE, PVP) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the server game mode was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the server game mode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id", "game_mode")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the player is currently on */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the player is playing */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the server */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the server (if applicable) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the player account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the player account was last updated */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "total_playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameplay_data" (
  "gameplay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gameplay session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the game is being played on */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the game */,
  "time_played" INTEGER /* Time played by the player in the game */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the gameplay data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the gameplay data was last updated */,
  "game_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the game session */,
  "player_performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the player during the game session (e.g., kills, deaths, score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gameplay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gameplay_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gameplay_data_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gameplay_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the map belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the map was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the map was last updated */,
  "map_size" INTEGER /* Size of the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server configuration */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the server configuration was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the server configuration was last updated */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., game settings, network settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_configurations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_configurations_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server configuration */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the server version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the server version was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES server_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "game_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the game session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the game session */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the game session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_session_players" (
  "game_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_session_id", "player_id")
)
